title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kid, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What will open do about the giant mountain God...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Could the capital really get destroyed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Over this little thing....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OINK saveel OINK saveel

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, be quiet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is why... I told you to give it to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No!! Please wait!! This boar is worth a piece of white gold!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could finally pay of my debts, id then I could...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is Kozuki often................. the one and only....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only adult I do not despise for being a fool. The one man I actually respect

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The mountain God would only come down the mountain...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: ...If its child was kidnapped!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So somebody brought its child here!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: White boars being the heralds of the gods is ancient knowledge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Many assumed it was only a Supersti- Tion!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must appease the mountain God's fury quickly....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep an eye out for a small white boar!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we fail to return it to the mountain... the capital will be destroyed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oink Oink!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It is eating humans and houses whole!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UWAHA AAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please help me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Save Meeeeeee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gya^^A AAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: FAATHER!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone please help!! The boar ate my daughter....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is a night- Mareeeeee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HOFF... HOFF... there you are!! I finally found you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey... you are the boar- napper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You stole it from us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, you must take it back to the mountains immediately!! The mountain god is heading straight for us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is follow- ing this little guy's scent!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We had no idea this would happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My comrades were eaten by the mountain god because they had the little boar's scent on them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your friend O-tsuru got caught up in this mess, too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What!??

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We wanted to get the white boar back from you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we took her HOSTAGE... but while we were making our way down the mountain...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let me go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THEY WERE ALL EATEN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is all your fault!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
